# Org-Level Rules (fixture excerpt for the t99 admission conflict-check)

> A trimmed aidlc-org.md used by t99 Case 3b. The single-line variant of
> the §5 gate matches a proposed dated learning into this org ## section by
> topic; the orchestrator-LLM judges the contradiction (stubbed in the
> test). persist never reads this file — it receives only conflict-clear or
> user-escalated selections.

## Way of Working

We use trunk-based development. All work merges to main via short-lived
feature branches. Long-lived release branches accumulate merge debt; we
avoid them.
